title: helictotrichon adsurgens
intro: Helictotrichon adsurgens, also known as 'Golden Fountain Grass', is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of central and eastern Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, Helictotrichon adsurgens can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
